title: logformatter: handle podman-remote
body:
Oops! Logs of podman-remote tests are unreadable, they have
multiple (useless) --remote options plus '--url /something/long'
that makes it impossible to read the actual command being run.
This commit strips off '--remote' entirely, and hides '--url'
and its arg in the only-on-mouse-hover '[options]' text.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Sure, LGTM

Looks like it worked. New sample log result:
```
Running: podman-remote [options] wait test
```
Compare to sample run without this:
```
Running: podman [options]-remote --remote --url unix:/run/podman/podman-fa8de23b7011e54d45327d4e76e5aa0cd8bdd807016d0ca8a5e7b0bde6251dd3.sock --remote --url unix:/run/podman/podman-fa8de23b7011e54d45327d4e76e5aa0cd8bdd807016d0ca8a5e7b0bde6251dd3.sock wait test
```

LGTM
and happy green test buttons
